rules.rule_text:
title: Local File Read Using Curl.EXE
id: aa6f6ea6-0676-40dd-b510-6e46f02d8867
status: test
description: Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "file://" protocol handler in
  order to read local files.
references:
- https://curl.se/docs/manpage.html
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2023-07-27
tags:
- attack.execution
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_img:
  - Image|endswith: \curl.exe
  - OriginalFileName: curl.exe
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains: file:///
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
regression_tests_path: regression_data/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_local_file_read/info.yml
